This listing is of Cheren's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Cheren
|pkmn=Herdier
|type1=Normal
|img=Cheren Herdier.png
|epnum=BW111
|epname=There's a New Gym Leader in Town!
|desc={{p|Herdier}} is Cheren's only known Pokémon. It was used to battle [[Ash's Oshawott]] and won.

Herdier's known moves are {{m|Take Down}} and {{m|Thunder Fang}}.}}

|desc=Cheren takes care of multiple {{p|Sunflora}} that live in the [[Aspertia Gym]]. When {{AP|Pikachu}} and {{TP|Iris|Axew}} accidentally caused loud noises on the school's PA, all of the school's Pokémon ran wildly around, including the Sunflora. However, Ash helped Cheren gather them.
